title: Anthropic reportedly views itself as the antidote to OpenAI's "tobacco industry" approach to AI
summary: Anthropic grew out of more than just concern for AI safety—it was born from a bitter power struggle and personal conflict at OpenAI. A report by Sam Altman biographer Keach Hagey reveals how personal slights, rivalries, and strategic disagreements led to what may be the most consequential split in the AI industry. title: Meta's hyperagents improve at tasks and improve at improving
summary: Researchers at Meta and several universities have developed "hyperagents," AI systems that don't just solve tasks, but also optimize the very mechanism they use to get better. The approach works across different task areas and could open the door to self-accelerating AI. The article Meta's hyperagents improve at tasks and improve at improving

title: OpenAI sets two-stage Sora shutdown with app closing April 2026 and API following in September
summary: OpenAI is pulling the plug on Sora, its AI video generation tool, in a two-stage shutdown starting April 2026. The move signals a major strategic shift away from creative AI tools and toward coding and enterprise products.
